note: Hand-pinned role reads where football knowledge beats the season's raw output. Each override wins over the classifier in scraper/roles.py. Set 'role' to change the primary, 'secondary_role' to set/clear the secondary trait (use null to clear). Valid role keys: ruck, key_fwd, small_fwd, gen_fwd, inside_mid, outside_mid, gun_mid, intercept_def, lockdown_def, rebound_def. Add an entry whenever the eye test disagrees with the stats.

overrides.name: Kysaiah Pickett
overrides.note: Heavy midfield minutes drive his numbers, but he remains a genuine small-forward threat — the forward craft the mid-heavy output understates.
